purpose: Structured prompt assets for future self-hosted Suno generation workflows

rules: Use BPM only when rhythm accuracy materially matters
Do not use giant unordered tag lists
Do not rely on artist-name imitation
Describe movement, not only static sound
Only include cues that should change the audible result
Use the lyric sheet for local energy control when needed
Do not turn the lyrics into a control panel

workflow_presets.name: v5 arrangement, then v5.5 vocal feel
use_when: v5 arrangement logic is stronger than v5.5 for the song
steps: Generate a structure-first pass in v5
Evaluate whether the instrumental identity is stable
Test the same concept in v5.5 only if stronger vocal expression is needed

workflow_presets.name: Lean style field with lyric-side section control
use_when: the style prompt is overpowering the lyrics
the song needs precise final-chorus lift
steps: Reduce the style field to core identity
Move only the most important section lifts into lyrics
Regenerate while keeping the song concept fixed

workflow_presets.name: Seed or cover workflow for genre protection
use_when: text prompts collapse into mainstream pop behavior
melodic or structural identity needs a harder anchor
steps: Specify the genre with explicit instrumentation
If text-only prompting still drifts, move to seed or cover workflows
Use prompt text to refine rather than replace the source anchor

failure_modes.name: repetitive_intros
failure_modes.first_response: Shorten intro guidance and bring the song idea in earlier

failure_modes.name: title_leakage
failure_modes.first_response: Delay title repetition and rewrite the first lines as scene entry

failure_modes.name: hiss_or_harsh_highs
failure_modes.first_response: Simplify style density and compare the same package in v5

failure_modes.name: flat_emotional_plateau
failure_modes.first_response: Reduce style overload and restore local contrast in the lyrics

failure_modes.name: genre_washout
failure_modes.first_response: Specify instruments more clearly and move earlier to seed or cover workflows

failure_modes.name: mid_song_collapse
failure_modes.first_response: Clarify bridge purpose and remove competing style signals
